titles.romaji: Dragon Ball Z: Tatta Hitori no Saishuu Kessen - Freeza ni Idonda Z Senshi Son Goku no Chi
titles.english: Dragon Ball Z: Bardock – The Father of Goku
titles.native: ドラゴンボールZ たったひとりの最終決戦〜フリーザに挑んだZ戦士 孫悟空の父〜
synonyms: DBZ: A Final Solitary Battle! The Z Warrior Son Goku's Father Challenges Furiza
Dragon Ball Z: A Lonesome, Final Battle - The Father of Z Warrior Son Goku, who Challenged Freeza
Dragon Ball Z - Le origini del mito
Драконий жемчуг Зет: Бардок — отец Гоку
titles.tmdb_title: Dragon Ball Z: Bardock - The Father of Goku

description:
Bardock, Son Goku's father, is a low-ranking Saiyan soldier who was given the power to see into the future by the last remaining alien on a planet he just destroyed. He witnesses the destruction of his race and must now do his best to stop Freeza's impending massacre.

(Source: Anime News Network)
